description: Create a nightly release workflow that can be triggered manually or called by another workflow. The workflow takes optional inputs for build number, repository URL, and repository username. It sets version variables for various package formats, creates a latest.json file, and uploads it to a nightly repository. The workflow then triggers multiple dependent workflows to build packages for various platforms, including Brew, C++, .NET, DEB, GEM, MATLAB, Maven, NPM, PIP, RPM, and Swift.
